title: brain status — --json success output (v2 merged read surface)
description: The ONE merged read surface (v2, #332) — absorbs the retired `doctor`, `db status`, `index status`, and `sync status` (ADR-0003). Four named sub-objects (vault / db / index / sync) + the retained health probes in checks[]. status.sync carries the four pending reconciliation counts from the SAME readReconcile routine `sync` acts on, so the two surfaces can never disagree about the pending set; the counts are informational (pending sync work is the normal state of a dirty tree) and never drive checks[]. checks[] is exactly: vault-reachable, git-healthy, provider-key-present (the NON-throwing hasGeminiApiKey probe — a missing key is ok:false at exit 0, never a crash), index-not-stale, migrations-current (a read-only schema-version read — status NEVER auto-applies a migration; a pending migration fails the check at exit 0, never the fail-closed exit 2 that mutations/sync/db rebuild use). The v1 doctor backup-health and signer-registry checks are retired with their machinery and do not appear. Contract deltas from v1 sync status: drops lastIndexedHead, adds the four pending counts. EXIT CONTRACT (binding): 0 whenever the payload was produced — INCLUDING ok:false; 2 only when the vault/config is unresolvable and no payload is possible. status opens the ledger store read-only from the existing schema (absent store/tables read as zero + a failed migrations-current check) and never creates or migrates it.

ok.description: true iff every checks[] probe passed. Health only — the sync pending counts never affect it.

path.description: The resolved absolute vault working-tree path.

headSha.description: The vault HEAD commit sha; "" when the vault is not a git repository or HEAD is unborn (git-healthy fails).

dirty.description: true iff `git status --porcelain` reports any entry. Informational — dirt is normal input for sync.

noteCount.description: Parsed note files in the working tree (the reconcile input size).

schemaVersion.description: Numeric prefix of the LATEST applied migration id (0013_links_v2 → 13); 0 when the store is absent/unmigrated.

noteCount.description: Projected `notes` rows (0 when the store/table is absent — never migrates to find out).

sectionCount.description: Sections across the parsed vault. The projection carries no section table (sections live only in canonical Markdown), so the vault snapshot is this count's source of truth.

linkCount.description: Projected `note_links` rows — plain AND typed edges (0 when absent).

chunkCount.description: LanceDB chunk rows in the search table (0 when the table/directory is absent — not-configured is not a failure).

staleCount.description: Notes whose content hash changed since their chunks were embedded (drives index-not-stale).

pendingChangedCount.description: Notes whose on-disk hash ≠ projection content_hash (would reindex on the next sync).

pendingNewCount.description: Working-tree notes with no projection row (would index fresh).

pendingDroppedCount.description: Projection rows with no backing file (would purge cross-store).

pendingMovedCount.description: Pure moves — same id + hash, new path (would update file_path in place, no re-embed).

detail.description: Human remediation hint on failure; null when ok.

checks.description: The retained doctor probes — exactly the five names above, each exactly once. vault-reachable fails (with the structural reason) when the vault holds a structurally unreconcilable note — invalid frontmatter, unreadable file, duplicate stable id — in which case the sync pending counts read zero (the id→note map is unreliable); the diagnostic surface degrades at exit 0 rather than dying where sync (a writer) fail-closes.

checks.name: git-healthy
checks.detail: the vault is not a git repository (or HEAD is unborn)

checks.name: provider-key-present
checks.detail: no ATLAS_GEMINI_API_KEY env var and no Keychain item `atlas-gemini-api-key`

checks.name: migrations-current
checks.detail: pending migration(s): 0001_core, 0003_provenance, 0004_claims, 0005_ledger_finalize, 0013_links_v2 — run `brain db migrate` (status never auto-applies)

x-atlas-contract.summary: The v2 merged read surface: vault/db/index/sync sub-objects + the five retained health probes; exit 0 whenever a payload is produced (including ok:false), exit 2 only on an unresolvable vault/config.
prohibitedEffects: creating the ledger DB file or applying any migration (a pending migration is a failed migrations-current check at exit 0, never an auto-apply)
taking the vault lock (read-only; never blocks or is blocked by a writer)
any git, projection, or index write
resolving the provider key (the presence probe never reads the key material)

errorCodes.when: any flag or argument is supplied

the vault path does not exist or the working tree cannot be read at all — no payload is possible. (A structurally-broken NOTE inside a readable vault is NOT this: it degrades to a failed vault-reachable check at exit 0.)
